title: FTWR Map Entry
description: The contract for a single entry in The Map. Authoritative reference for PR-driven contributions. Validated in CI on every PR.

cat.description: Map category (§01-§09). One of the fixed category IDs.

name.description: Tool or resource name as the project itself uses it.

desc.description: Neutral description: what it does and what its constraints are. Under 200 characters.

url.description: Canonical URL (homepage, repository, or primary documentation).

tags.description: Controlled tag vocabulary. New tags require an RFC or steward approval.

edge.description: The edge type this entry addresses.

contributor.description: Handle of the contributor who added or last substantively edited the entry. Must start with @.

added.description: ISO date the entry was first added.

last_verified.description: ISO date the entry was last confirmed to exist and behave as described. Entries older than 180 days are flagged for re-verification.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for code entries. Optional for non-code entries.

coi.description: Conflict-of-interest disclosure if the contributor has a material interest in the tool. Free text. Required when present rather than optional: if there is a material interest, it must be disclosed.

sport.description: Primary sport this entry concerns, if sport-specific. Omit for sport-agnostic entries.

featured.description: If true, the entry is surfaced in the 'Start Here' strip at the top of The Map. Use sparingly: featured entries should be canonical starting points, not promotional placements. Set by stewards.

featured_note.description: Short caption (under 120 chars) shown under the featured card explaining why this is a good starting point. Required when 'featured' is true; ignored otherwise.
